statistical_anchor: Price at $388.69 (10-day high, range position 1.0) sits 4.4% below the 50-day MA ($406.75), while today’s +5.66% move occurred on only 1.08x average volume with a streak reset to zero, indicating short-term momentum exhaustion.
volume_assessment: Normal tape (1.08x 30-day average) lacks conviction for trend continuation; statistically, large percentage gains on flat volume typically precede consolidation or mean reversion rather than sustained directional moves.
trend_assessment: Price is at the absolute top of its recent range but remains structurally below the 50-day MA, signaling short-term momentum exhaustion within a broader corrective structure; the zero-session streak confirms a pause in directional pressure.
regime_context: Normal volatility (VIX ~16.9) and stable rate environment historically compress extended moves in semiconductor equities, favoring range-bound behavior over trend continuation until volume expansion or MA breaks confirm a regime shift.
watch_items: Price closes below $380 on >1.2x volume (confirms short-term reversal probability)
Break and hold above $406.75 (50-day MA) with >1.3x volume (confirms trend continuation probability)
